summary: Single Team subscriber ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball archive non-subscribed teams - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a single team subscriber
AND an archived ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game doesn't include the subscribed-to-team
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action: WHEN the user selects an archive ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND the user will see the ESPN feed button with a lock icon
AND a blackout message does not display
AND the user cannot playback the feed
